0.text: TCD 009/2020 Five Real Estate Development LLC v Reem Emirates Aluminium LLC

1.text: AUGUST 30, 2023 TECHNOLOGY AND CONSTRUCTION DIVISION - ORDERS

3.text: THE DUBAI INTERNATIONAL FINANCIAL CENTRE COURTS

4.text: IN THE COURT OF FIRST INSTANCE

11.text: FINAL COSTS CERTIFICATE OF THE REGISTRAR AYESHA BIN KALBAN

12.text: UPON the Defendant’s Notices of Commencement of Assessment of Bill of Costs dated 22 and 23 June 2023 (the “Notices of Commencement”)

13.text: AND UPON the Claimant’s points of dispute dated 14 July 2023 fi led in response to the Notices of Commencement (the “Points of Dispute”)

14.text: AND UPON the Defendant’s reply to the Points of Dispute dated 31 July 2023 (the “Reply to the Points of Dispute”)

15.text: AND PURSUANT TO Part 40 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts (“RDC”)

17.text: 1. The following sums are payable by the Claimant to the Defendant:

18.text: (a) AED 2,895,346.08 in respect of the Defendant’s costs in the course of these proceedings including the costs assessment proceedings; and

19.text: (b) AED 217,150.95 in respect of the fee paid by the Defendant for commencement of the costs assessment proceedings.

20.text: 2. The Claimant shall pay the Defendant the sums ordered in paragraph 1 of this Costs Certifi cate within 21 days from the date of the Costs Certifi cate.
